vocab.meaning: bắt đầu trở nên yêu thích/cảm mến ai đó
vocab.example: Although I was intimidated at first, I quickly warmed up to my chemistry teacher because of her witty sense of humor.

vocab.meaning: truyền đạt (ý tưởng/kiến thức) một cách hiệu quả
vocab.example: He had a remarkable ability to bring across difficult philosophical concepts in a way that teenagers could relate to.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào, tạo ra (nguồn cảm hứng hoặc sự quan tâm)
vocab.example: A single lecture from my biology teacher sparked off a lifelong passion for genetics and medical research.

vocab.meaning: tiếp cận để giúp đỡ hoặc kết nối (về mặt tinh thần/học tập)
vocab.example: She would always reach out to students who were falling behind, offering them extra support after class.

vocab.meaning: lật giở nhanh (sách/tài liệu) - thường dùng để nói về việc giáo viên cho xem tài liệu hay
vocab.example: I remember him leafing through his old travel journals to show us real-world examples of the geography we were studying.

vocab.meaning: đảm bảo cho, khẳng định năng lực/phẩm chất của ai
vocab.example: I can certainly vouch for his dedication; he would stay back late every day to ensure everyone understood the lesson.

vocab.meaning: lan truyền/ảnh hưởng sang ai đó (thói quen, thái độ tốt)
vocab.example: Her infectious enthusiasm for English literature eventually rubbed off on me, even though I used to find it boring.

vocab.meaning: bớt khắt khe, nhẹ tay hơn với ai đó
vocab.example: He knew when to ease up on us during stressful exam periods, which made us respect him even more.

vocab.meaning: chỉ ra (lỗi sai hoặc những điều thú vị)
vocab.example: She was excellent at pointing out the hidden nuances in poetry that most of us would have completely overlooked.

vocab.meaning: cổ vũ, khuyến khích (thường là trong các nỗ lực cá nhân)
vocab.example: My math teacher didn't just teach; he was always there to cheer us on during academic competitions.
